message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle handwritten
skinparam backgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
    ArrowColor #666666
    ActorBorderColor #666666
    ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

title Video Streaming Architecture - Sequence Diagram

participant "VideoSink" as VideoSink
participant "VideoDecoder" as VideoDecoder
participant "VideoReceiver" as VideoReceiver
participant "RTPReceiver" as RTPReceiver
participant "Transceiver" as Transceiver
participant "DTLS" as DTLS
participant "AcmOfPacket" as AcmOfPacket

== Receive RTP ==

DTLS -> AcmOfPacket: OnReadEvent()
AcmOfPacket -> AcmOfPacket: ParsePacket()
AcmOfPacket -> AcmOfPacket: OnReadEvent()
AcmOfPacket -> DTLS: SignalReadEvent
DTLS -> DTLS: OnReadEvent()
DTLS -> DTLS: ProcessPacket()
DTLS -> DTLS: OnReadEvent()
DTLS -> Transceiver: OnReadEvent()
Transceiver -> Transceiver: RtpTransport::OnReadPacket()
Transceiver -> Transceiver: RtpTransport::OnReadPacket()
Transceiver -> Transceiver: RtpTransport::OnReadPacket()
Transceiver -> RTPReceiver: OnReadEvent()

== Receive Video ==

RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver: OnReadEvent()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver: RtpVideoStreamReceiver::OnReadEvent()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver: RtpVideoStreamReceiver::OnReadEvent()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver: RtpVideoStreamReceiver::OnReadEvent()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver: RtpVideoStreamReceiver::OnReadEvent()
RTPReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver......: OnReadEvent()
VideoReceiver -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder: OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder:...... OnReadEvent()
VideoDecoder -> VideoSink: OnReadEvent()

@enduml
```
